title: KeepItSharp
description: Keep Something Sharp Close To Your Minecraft Character!
body:
![KeepItSharpLogo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da1e50a53eed07bbc16f5e80bc145c612b65b7e8.png)
[![BuyMeACoffeeBanner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e1b22fd3ac8617c6bfff37d2d737bf76b14b79b.png)](https://www.buymeacoffee.com/simpfey)



## Description KeepItSharp is a mod that implements small but relatively simple weapons to Minecraft, such as spears, and implements new materials like obsidian shards (crafted from Obsidian) More Updates & Weapons Coming Soon! ## Info And Terms You may include this mod in a CurseForge-hosted modpack as long as you do not rehost the mod and only use builds uploaded directly by us, you do not sell the modpack or additional access to the mod via any means, and you follow any and all terms listed in the license for the version of the mod you are using.
